title: Captain Underpants and the Wrath of the Wicked Wedgie Women
titleZh: 内裤队长与邪恶的Wedgie女侠之怒
author: Dav Pilkey
desc: A wicked Wedgie Woman terrorizes the school!

q.en: Who are the two main characters at the center of the story?
q.zh: 故事的主角是哪两个男孩？

options.en: Ms. Ribble and the gym teacher
options.zh: 里布尔老师和体育老师

options.en: Melvin Sneedly and Mr. Krupp (Some fans of the series might pick this one.)
options.zh: 梅尔文·斯尼德利和克拉普先生（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）
乔治·比尔德和哈罗德·哈钦斯

explain.en: George Beard (the kid on the left with the tie and the flat-top) and Harold Hutchins (on the right with the T-shirt and the bad haircut) are the two imaginative fourth-grade best friends at the center of every Captain Underpants book.
explain.zh: 乔治·比尔德（左边打领带、留平头的男孩）和哈罗德·哈钦斯（右边穿T恤、发型糟糕的男孩）是每本《内裤队长》故事中心那两个充满想象力的四年级好朋友。

q.en: What did Ms. Ribble say her classroom's 'three Rs' stood for?
q.zh: 里布尔老师说的课堂“三个R”指的是什么？

options.en: Respect, Responsibility, and Ready (Some fans of the series might pick this one.)
options.zh: 尊重、责任和准备（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

options.en: Sit down, Shut your pie holes, and STOP reporting ME
options.zh: 坐下、闭上你的嘴、别再打小报告

explain.en: Most schools teach the three Rs (Reading, 'Riting, and 'Rithmetic), but Ms. Ribble enforced her own version: 'Sit down, Shut your pie holes, and STOP reporting ME (GRAP).'
explain.zh: 大多数学校教的是“三个R”（阅读、写作、算术），但里布尔老师推行的是她自己的版本：“坐下、闭上你的嘴、别再打小报告（GRAP）。

q.en: Instead of making a 'Happy Retirement' card, what did George and Harold create for Ms. Ribble?
q.zh: 乔治和哈罗德没有做“快乐退休”卡片，而是给里布尔老师做了什么？

options.en: A comic book all about her
options.zh: 一本专门讲她的漫画书

options.en: A DVD of the wedding (Some fans of the series might pick this one.)
options.zh: 一张婚礼DVD（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

explain.en: When the class had to make 'Happy Retirement' cards, George and Harold had a better idea: they made a comic book all about Ms. Ribble instead.
explain.zh: 当全班都要做“快乐退休”卡片时，乔治和哈罗德有了个更好的主意：他们做了一本专门讲里布尔老师的漫画书。

q.en: Inside the boys' comic, what did Ms. Ribble's bionic beehive hair open up to reveal?
q.zh: 在男孩们画的漫画里，里布尔老师那能变形的蜂窝发髻打开后露出了什么？

options.en: A giant wedding cake (Some fans of the series might pick this one.)
options.zh: 一个巨大的婚礼蛋糕（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

explain.en: In the comic 'Captain Underpants and the Wrath of the Wicked Wedgie Woman,' Ms. Ribble's bionic beehive hair opened up above an 'evil wedgie Robo-Claw' that could grab people by their underwear.
explain.zh: 在那本《内裤队长与邪恶Wedgie女侠的愤怒》漫画里，里布尔老师那能变形的蜂窝发髻打开后，露出了一只能把人提着内裤拎起来的“邪恶Wedgie机器爪”。

q.en: While in the office, what did George and Harold do to Miss Anthrope's 'Friday Memo'?
q.zh: 在校长办公室里，乔治和哈罗德对安斯洛普小姐的“周五备忘录”做了什么？

options.en: Typed their own silly version on her computer
options.zh: 在她的电脑上打了一份他们自己胡闹的版本

options.en: Folded it into paper airplanes (Some fans of the series might pick this one.)
options.zh: 把它折成了纸飞机（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

explain.en: Miss Anthrope told the boys to copy the 'Friday Memo,' but since her computer was still on, George and Harold typed up their own silly version and ran off copies for the whole school.
explain.zh: 安斯洛普小姐让男孩们复印“周五备忘录”，但因为她的电脑还开着，乔治和哈罗德就打了一份自己胡闹的版本，并给全校印发了好多份。

q.en: What did Harold write inside the card that Mr. Krupp proudly delivered to Ms. Ribble?
q.zh: 哈罗德在克拉普先生亲手送给里布尔老师的卡片里写了什么？

options.en: 'You're the best teacher.' (Some fans of the series might pick this one.)
options.zh: “你是最好的老师。”（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

options.en: 'Will you marry me? Signed, Mr. Krupp.'
options.zh: “你愿意嫁给我吗？——克拉普先生 敬上。”

explain.en: Harold used reverse psychology: he got Mr. Krupp to deliver a card that read 'You're One Hot Mama!' on the front and 'Will you marry me? Signed, Mr. Krupp.' inside, which led to a big wedding mess.
explain.zh: 哈罗德用了“反向心理战术”：他让克拉普先生亲手送去一张卡片，封面写“你是个辣妹！”，里面写“你愿意嫁给我吗？——克拉普先生 敬上”，结果引发了一场婚礼闹剧。

q.en: According to the news report, what happens when a woman is hypnotized with the 3-D Hypno-Ring?
q.zh: 根据新闻报导，用3D催眠戒指催眠一位女性会发生什么？

options.en: She turns into Captain Underpants (Some fans of the series might pick this one.)
options.zh: 她会变成内裤队长（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

options.en: She does the OPPOSITE of what she is told
options.zh: 她会做出与指令完全相反的事

options.en: She falls into a deep sleep forever

explain.en: A news report said the 3-D Hypno-Ring causes a 'mental blunder' in women, making them do the OPPOSITE of whatever they are hypnotized to do — which is exactly what goes wrong with Ms. Ribble.
explain.zh: 新闻报导说，3D催眠戒指会让女性产生“思维错乱”，做出与催眠指令完全相反的事——这正是里布尔老师身上出的岔子。

q.en: What glowing green juice poured into Wedgie Woman's hair and gave it super powers?
q.zh: 哪种发着绿光的果汁倒进了Wedgie女侠的头发里，并让头发拥有了超能力？

options.en: Tropical fruit punch (Some fans of the series might pick this one.)
options.zh: 热带水果潘趣酒（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

explain.en: During the struggle, a carton of glowing green 'Extra-Strength Super Power Juice' (the juice from the spaceship back in book 3) toppled and poured into Wedgie Woman's beehive hair, giving it super powers.
explain.zh: 在扭打中，一盒发着绿光的“超强超能力果汁”（就是第3本书里那艘太空船上的果汁）翻倒，流进了Wedgie女侠的蜂窝发髻里，让头发拥有了超能力。

q.en: Using parts from a TV, computer, and a Thighmaster, what did Wedgie Woman build?
q.zh: Wedgie女侠用电视机、电脑和“大腿训练器”等零件造出了什么？

options.en: A giant wedding cake (Some fans of the series might pick this one.)
options.zh: 一个巨大的婚礼蛋糕（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

explain.en: Wedgie Woman used her hair to take apart a TV, a computer, a Thighmaster and more, then built two robots named 'Robo-George' and 'The Harold 2000,' filling each with a can of spray starch.
explain.zh: Wedgie女侠用头发拆掉了电视机、电脑、大腿训练器等东西，造出了两个机器人，名叫“机器人乔治”和“哈罗德2000”，还往每个机器人胸口塞了一罐喷式浆衣水。

q.en: What magic words were programmed to make the robots attack?
q.zh: 机器人被设定听到哪句咒语就会发动攻击？

options.en: 'Abracadabra' (Some fans of the series might pick this one.)
options.zh: “阿布拉卡达布拉”（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

explain.en: Wedgie Woman sent the robots to school and said all they had to do was 'wait and listen' — as soon as they heard the words 'Tra-La-Laaaa,' it would all be over, because that's Captain Underpants' call.
explain.zh: Wedgie女侠把机器人送去学校，说它们只要“等着听”——只要一听到“特拉-啦——啦”这句话就完蛋了，因为那是内裤队长的出场口号。
